tests_added: tests/us-008/rendering-signals.test.ts: US-008: collectRenderingSignals > return shape and required fields > returns an object with all required keys

tests/us-008/rendering-signals.test.ts: US-008: collectRenderingSignals > WebGL2 available with debug renderer info > populates all fields with real values
tests/us-008/rendering-signals.test.ts: US-008: collectRenderingSignals > WebGL2 unavailable, fallback to WebGL1 > falls back to webgl context and still collects renderer
tests/us-008/rendering-signals.test.ts: US-008: collectRenderingSignals > WebGL completely unsupported > returns all fields as unavailable when no context is obtainable

tests/us-008/rendering-signals.test.ts: US-008: collectRenderingSignals > getContext throws SecurityError > returns all fallback values without throwing
tests/us-008/rendering-signals.test.ts: US-008: collectRenderingSignals > document.createElement throws > returns full unavailable result
tests/us-008/rendering-signals.test.ts: US-008: collectRenderingSignals > document is undefined > returns full unavailable result when document does not exist
tests/us-008/rendering-signals.test.ts: US-008: collectRenderingSignals > renderer and vendor return empty strings > treats empty strings as unavailable
tests/us-008/rendering-signals.test.ts: US-008: collectRenderingSignals > WebGL context cleanup > calls WEBGL_lose_context to clean up resources
tests/us-008/rendering-signals.test.ts: US-008: collectRenderingSignals > WebGL context cleanup > does not throw when WEBGL_lose_context extension is unavailable
